name: Adamantine Armor
description: This suit of armor is reinforced with adamantine, one of the hardest substances in existence. While you're wearing it, any Critical Hit against you becomes a normal hit.

effect.description: Critical hits against you become normal hits
effect.trigger: Any critical hit would be made against you

activation.description: The magic functions automatically while wearing the armor

notes: This armor is particularly valuable for characters that draw a lot of enemy attention, as it prevents critical damage from becoming devastating.
